rows.label: tev060701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Pissa about Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Pissa if anything is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0001
rows.name:
We all try to stop Potepote
from going to Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0002
rows.name:
Everyone know this continent
have lots of dangerous critters
and very little food.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0003
rows.name:
But Potepote decide to
bring caravan here anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0004
rows.name:
As expected, caravan found no food.
Everyone pushed to brink of starvation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0005
rows.name:
But then, caravan miraculously stumble upon
gerrid that fell into magma and became baked
to crisp. It saved life of caravan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0006
rows.name:
Never again will Pissa agree to
treacherous journey where survival
depends on eating yucky meat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0009
rows.name:
Potepote like to talk big, but deep
down Potepote is only coward![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0010
rows.name:
Whenever caravan travel around
Cauldros, Potepote cling to
Pissa and shake like leaf![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0011
rows.name:
And once when blatta spotted us,
Potepote wet self like baby! Mo-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0012
rows.name:
Yet somehow Potepote think it okay to act
like king of caravan and give Pissa
impossible orders under threat of tickling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0013
rows.name:
Elder Nan told Pissa to be aide many long
years ago, so Pissa do what elder say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0014
rows.name:
But Pissa would really like to file for
transfer and start new NORMAL life...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Pissa about the caravan.

rows.label: tev060701_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Pissa about recent developments.

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0015
rows.name:
Mo-mo! Now that Mr. Disaster is out of picture,
caravan business is booming. Pissa too busy to
even stop and think or take bit of Pissa-time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0016
rows.name:
Old leader used to force caravan to plow through
magma just to save time. Then critters come along
and knock precious cargo into magma. Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0017
rows.name:
Well, those days are over.
Pissa is going to go AROUND
magma, even if it take longer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0018
rows.name:
Running safe business for cargo
and workers and nopopotamus way
more important than saving time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0023
rows.name:
Did friend see fireworks of
Pissa? They were perfect![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0024
rows.name:
Elder Nan even sent Pissa thank-you letter. Sounds
like elder is going to whip sense into Potepote
back in NLA. Turn Potepote into future elder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0025
rows.name:
In meantime, Pissa going to do
everything to keep caravan safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0026
rows.name:
And Pissa try not to think too hard
about whether elder actually have
any sense to whip into Potepote...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0032
rows.name:
Caro are nocturnal. Sleep
like logs during day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0033
rows.name:
It is absolutely vital to sneak by caro
VERY quietly! This is strict rule![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0034
rows.name:
But old leader not do that. Old
leader walk up to caro and try to
kick caro out of way. Meeeeh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0035
rows.name:
Thrilling day is key to job
fulfillment, leader say!
Leader is big stinking idiot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0036
rows.name:
Caravan very lucky that situation
change before everyone working
here was wiped out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Pissa about life in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Pissa about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_SEL2031
rows.name: Ask Pissa about life in NLA.

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0027
rows.name: Human drinks are delicious![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0037
rows.name:
Life of Pissa was especially changed by
magical elixir friends call "beer."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0038
rows.name:
Beer so fizzy and fresh! Make Pissa
want to say "Ahh!" after every chug![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0039
rows.name:
Pissa never get to try beer if Pissa
stay in Drongo Caravan—or with any
family of elder, for that matter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0040
rows.name:
Pissa was sad friend choose Pissa at first,
but now understands it was for best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0028
rows.name:
Pissa is furious! Seriously,
Pissa have it up to here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0029
rows.name:
Pissa totally done with awful life stuck
between pervy elder and idiot grandson. Whole
family ruin things for Pissa enough already![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0030
rows.name:
From now on, Pissa staying away from
caravan and living life of freedom.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0031
rows.name:
No more keeping Pissa down!
Pissa only live once![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0041
rows.name:
Pissa make lots of different
friends in diner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0042
rows.name: Everyone have interesting story to tell.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0043
rows.name:
Bias overcome sadness to be here...
Larsians stand by sense of duty...
Pissa shrug off bonds of misery...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060701_MSG0044
rows.name:
Pissa never experience any of
this if not for friend. Such
are twists and turns of life![ST:wait ]
